$comment: Neutral (base-culture) strings for the FluentGpu control kit. This file is a BUILD input only (an AdditionalFiles item, not Content): the LocalizationKeysGenerator turns it into (1) the compile-safe FluentGpu.Controls.Strings key surface and (2) a module initializer that registers this table with Localization.RegisterNeutral — so the kit's text renders these neutral strings with ZERO app configuration, and an app that ships a culture folder overrides any key per-culture. Keys use control-semantic namespaces (unprefixed, matching the existing validation.* convention). Universal notation (aspect ratios, the '×' rate symbol, the 'p' resolution suffix, the 'F11' key name) stays invariant in C# and is intentionally NOT keyed here.

dialog.$comment: ContentDialog default command labels. Only the primary (OK) is a genuine default; Cancel/Yes/No/Close are caller-supplied.

infoBar.$comment: InfoBar (and Toast, which builds on InfoBar) close-button tooltip — WinUI SR_InfoBarCloseButtonTooltip.

media.$comment: MediaPlayerElement chrome (MediaStrings). Status overlays, transport button/menu labels, and the parameterized track/caption labels.
